title: Punnainallur Mariamman
tagline: Punnainallur Mariamman — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: The Punnai Nallur Mariamman Temple, temple of goddess Mariamman, is a Hindu temple located at Punnainallur near Thanjavur in the state of Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: The Punnai Nallur Mariamman Temple, temple of goddess Mariamman, is a Hindu temple located at Punnainallur near Thanjavur in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. Situated on the outskirts of Thanjavur, Punnainallur popularly known as Thanjavur Mariamman Kovil has derived considerable importance from time immemorial in both legend and history. The temple attracts thousands of devotees from all parts of the district throughout the year. Thanks to the munificence of its devotees, the temple has been given a facelift in the recent past.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Punnainallur Mariamman?
faq.a: The best time to visit Punnainallur Mariamman is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Punnainallur Mariamman?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (52 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (55 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Punnainallur Mariamman?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Punnainallur Mariamman at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Punnainallur Mariamman?
faq.a: Stays in Punnainallur Mariamman start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Punnainallur Mariamman?
faq.a: The top attractions are Punnainallur, Punnainallur Kothandaramar Temple, Bhavaniyambalpuram, Kadakadappai, Kulichapattu.
